message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Sequence Diagram for Sharing More Functionality

participant "CShareMoreDlg" as CShareMoreDlg
participant "CSharingMoreWrapper" as CSharingMoreWrapper
participant "CPfwMainFrame" as CPfwMainFrame
participant "CPfwChainMessageMapT" as CPfwChainMessageMapT
participant "CMCUIMgr" as CMCUIMgr
participant "CSmDefUIMgr" as CSmDefUIMgr
participant "CPfwMessageCenterAgent" as CPfwMessageCenterAgent
participant "CSmFITUIMgr" as CSmFITUIMgr
participant "CMCFITUIMgr" as CMCFITUIMgr
participant "CSmAppShareSessionMgr" as CSmAppShareSessionMgr
participant "CPcmAppShareMgr" as CPcmAppShareMgr

note left of CShareMoreDlg: User Click "Other Application"
activate CShareMoreDlg
CShareMoreDlg ->> CSharingMoreWrapper: OnBtnShareOtherApp
activate CSharingMoreWrapper
CSharingMoreWrapper ->> CPfwMainFrame: ShareOtherApp
activate CPfwMainFrame
note right of CPfwMainFrame: PFW_QS_MENU_SHARE_OTHER_APP_ID
CPfwMainFrame ->> CPfwChainMessageMapT: SendMessage
activate CPfwChainMessageMapT
CPfwChainMessageMapT ->> CPfwMainFrame: PfwChainProcessWindowMessage
CPfwMainFrame ->> CPfwChainMessageMapT: ProcessWindowMessage
deactivate CPfwChainMessageMapT
CPfwMainFrame ->> CMCUIMgr: OnWindowMsg
activate CMCUIMgr
CMCUIMgr ->> CSmDefUIMgr: OnWindowMsg
activate CSmDefUIMgr
CSmDefUIMgr ->> CSmDefUIMgr: ChainToMsgCenter
CSmDefUIMgr ->> CPfwMessageCenterAgent: SendMessage
activate CPfwMessageCenterAgent
CPfwMessageCenterAgent ->> CSmFITUIMgr: ProcessWindowMessage
activate CSmFITUIMgr
CSmFITUIMgr ->> CMCFITUIMgr: OnCommand
activate CMCFITUIMgr
CMCFITUIMgr ->> CSmFITUIMgr: OnCommand
deactivate CMCFITUIMgr
CSmFITUIMgr ->> CSmAppShareSessionMgr: SelectANewApplication
activate CSmAppShareSessionMgr
CSmAppShareSessionMgr ->> CPcmAppShareMgr: ShowInstalledAppDialog
activate CPcmAppShareMgr
deactivate CPcmAppShareMgr
deactivate CSmAppShareSessionMgr
deactivate CSmFITUIMgr
deactivate CPfwMessageCenterAgent
deactivate CSmDefUIMgr
deactivate CMCUIMgr
deactivate CPfwMainFrame
deactivate CSharingMoreWrapper
deactivate CShareMoreDlg

@enduml
```
